response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — his resume emphasizes diverse tooling and open-source work over enterprise GenAI delivery.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record of building and open-sourcing complex systems (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years delivering production-grade AI/GenAI solutions
Missing demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Career gap since Oct 2025 and recent role at re:cinq is too short to establish staff-level impact
